title: Odoo
description: Open-source suite of business apps: CRM, e-commerce, accounting, inventory, project management, HR and more.
installation: Odoo requires PostgreSQL ONLY (it does not support MySQL); the postgresql add-on is wired in via HOST/USER/PASSWORD/PORT. On first run the role 'odoo' must be able to CREATE DATABASE so the web installer can provision the Odoo database; the bundled add-on role has this. Rotate the add-on password and the 'admin' master password (set ODOO_RC or use the Database Manager) after install, and lock down /web/database/manager. The /var/lib/odoo volume holds the filestore (attachments, uploads, sessions) and must be persistent. Custom modules go in /mnt/extra-addons. COMPANION SERVICES (deploy as separate apps from the same odoo:18.0 image, sharing the same PostgreSQL add-on and filestore volume): (1) a long-polling/gevent worker for live chat, discuss and websockets, started with command 'odoo gevent' (or 'odoo --workers=N' in multi-worker mode listening on the gevent port 8072); (2) optionally a dedicated cron/scheduler worker (odoo --max-cron-threads=N). In a single-replica deployment the embedded cron and HTTP worker handle scheduling, so the standalone web template alone is functional for evaluation. For production multi-worker mode put a reverse proxy in front (proxy_mode=True) so X-Forwarded-* is honored.
